## SAF1.3. Rate of runway incursions (RIs) (PI#1)

Finland reported 6 runway incursions (RI) at Helsinki airport during 2025. When comparing the RIs at airport level to Union-wide level, Finland was higher than Union-wide average (3.80 vs 2.53).

Finland reported 2 runway incursions with ATS/CNS contribution. When comparing airport level with ATS/CNS contribution to the Union-wide level, Finland was slightly higher than Union-wide average (1.27 vs 0.96).

The rate of runway incursions has increased compared to 2024 at both airport level (3.80 vs 1.96) and ATS/CNS contribution-level (1.27 vs 0.65).

Finland notes in the monitoring report that the NSA started using ERCS risk classification at full scale from the beginning of 2025, which has led to increase in both RI and SMI compared to previous years, however also noting that the actual safety situation has remained unchanged.
